title: VFP Design Context
description: Current schematic / ADE context exported from the Virtuoso Flow Plugin to VFP Tunnel (RPC: design.context.update).

connectivity_risks.description: Auto-named, unlabeled nets that bear instance terminals. Their names are reassigned by schematic check after any rewiring, so consumers must not key on them. Pin with vfpPinNetLabel to clear.

tb_lint.description: Testbench connectivity hazards found by vfpLintTestbench: floating terminals, dead nets, and dangling stimulus sources.

sim_preflight.description: Pre-flight from vfpSimPreflight: whether the cellview is safe to netlist (dirty-check) and the content fingerprint the tunnel's freshness guard keys on.

ready.description: false when the cellview has unsaved changes.

fingerprint.description: Content digest (test + connectivity + CDF params); identical inputs => identical fingerprint.

layout.description: Read-only layout snapshot (L1) from vfpLayoutReadSummary / vfpLayoutReadGeometry: placement, layer/shape counts, and via count. Routed nets are deferred to L3. Absent for schematic-only contexts.

params.description: Device/instance parameters (e.g. w, l, m, nf).

kind.description: Why the net is fragile (auto_net = auto-named, unlabeled).

terminals.description: Instance terminals (inst.term) connected to this net.

kind.description: floatingTerm = terminal wired to nothing; danglingSource = the same on a stimulus source.

subject.description: The offending instance terminal, as inst.term.

net.description: The degenerate net the terminal sits on, or null when unwired.

point.description: A coordinate [x, y] in user units (see layout.units).

bbox.description: Bounding box as [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]] (lower-left, upper-right), mirroring Cadence bBox.

units.description: Coordinate units for all points and bboxes, e.g. "um".

vias.description: Total via count (cv~>vias). Per-via position/type is deferred to L3.

master.description: Master as "lib/cell/view", matching the connectivity-snapshot convention.

orient.description: Placement orientation, e.g. R0, R90, MX, MY.

layer.description: Layer name, e.g. M1, M2, POLY.
